title: Knarfy's Ruined Mod
description: A mod created by Knarfy and completely ruined by his fans
body:
# Knarfy's Ruined Minecraft Mod
Knarfy created a Minecraft mod with a set of simple features. This mod was then shown to his YouTube audience... and that went well.
The features suggested by his audience were then coded into the game... so of course this mod is insane.

Check out the original YouTube video here:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/ONz5HGrbBi0" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


### A few of the included features are as follows:
 - Exploding mobs (check gamerules)
 - Exploding mushrooms (check gamerules)
 - Goldfish
 - Legend of Zelda Mushrooms
 - Gruffernuts
 - Shearable Puffernuts
 - Thorns
 - Puffshroom Stew
 - Probably more :D

**There are two versions of this Minecraft mod. Version 1.0.0 has only the original features of the mod before suggestions were coded in to ruin everything. Version 1.0.3 has all of the changes from the video implimented.**

**Disclaimer: PLEASE don't use this mod on a world you like!! It can and will completely destroy your Minecraft world.**

This mod also requires [Geckolib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib)! Make sure that is also installed!
